reference_structure.reference_name: Leviton EXTREME Cat 6 Component-Rated UTP QUICKPORT Jack spec sheet
reused: page-1 header, blue rule, product title, two-column technical narrative, product image position and vertical model marker
page-1 section sequence: Application, Specification, Features & Benefits, Design Considerations, Standards & Regulations, Country of Origin
page-2 header, mechanical specifications, warranty block, dimension drawing area, part-number table and regional contact footer
dense B2B spec-sheet typography and table logic

source_confirmed_fields.plastic_parts: High impact flame retardant plastic, UL 94V-0 rated
source_confirmed_fields.jack_wire: 0.35 mm phosphor bronze gold over nickel plating

distinctive_content_markers.label: private_label_rfq_flow
distinctive_content_markers.description: Convert grade, logo, packaging and carton-mark requirements into RFQ inputs.

distinctive_content_markers.label: multi_grade_family_mapping
distinctive_content_markers.description: Use one product family page to expose CAT6A, CAT6 and CAT5E item numbers.

distinctive_content_markers.label: source_truth_labeling
distinctive_content_markers.description: Separate source-confirmed values from certificate-file-pending claims before publication.

blocked_claims: Do not claim UL, ETL, CE or other third-party certification until files are provided.
Do not publish RoHS as externally verified until certificate file is attached.
Do not state exact MOQ, lead time or warranty until user or factory confirms.
Do not reuse Leviton brand assets, trademarks, contact information or protected long-form body copy.
